hooks.command: echo 'tasktracker is this project'\''s shared work + knowledge base. BEFORE you start: call the tasktracker MCP tool get_started to load your projects + recent decisions, then search(q) the KB for prior ADRs/notes - never re-derive what it already records. AS you work: capture non-obvious findings as notes. ON close: graduate the durable decision into an ADR, then set the issue done.'
echo 'Before you finish: did you capture new decisions/findings as tasktracker notes, and graduate the durable one into an ADR? Update the issue status if the work moved.'
